subcodes.first_line: O dervish of Bahá! The time hath come for the poor and the wayfarers to detach themselves from all earthly concerns [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای درویش بهاء وقت آنست که فقیر و درویش از شئون ماسوى
subcodes.subjects: @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
